mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYOUT_ACCOUNT ( trainer_id, trainer_type, gym_id, commission_rate, business_registration_num, resident_registration_num, bank_name, account_number, is_active ) VALUES ( #{trainerId}, #{trainerType}, #{gymId}, #{commissionRate}, #{businessRegistrationNum}, #{residentRegistrationNum}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT id, trainer_id, trainer_type, gym_id, commission_rate, business_registration_num, resident_registration_num, bank_name, account_number, is_active, created_at FROM PAYOUT_ACCOUNT WHERE trainer_id = #{trainerId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYOUT_ACCOUNT SET is_active = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
